analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观信号矛盾：日元疲软（风险偏好）但DXY走强和VIX飙升（风险规避）。新闻面显示ETF资金流入提供支撑，但宏观不确定性主导。这属于已定价的混合叙事，没有新的驱动改变熊市结构。【Qlib排名】BNB（0.1002）和BTC（0.0982）相对最强，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-1.1），市场活跃度不足。【痛苦交易】SOL和BNB的L/S爆仓比高达6.52和2.77，显示零售多头被大量清洗，但价格未大幅下跌，暗示鲸鱼可能在托底吸筹。ETH的L/S比1.54较平衡，无极端信号。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼托底吸筹”剧本：在熊市中，利用零售恐慌（高L/S比）和鲸鱼积累信号（如SOL的24h净流入）进行左侧布局，但需严格风险管理。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with conflicting macro signals: JPY weakness (risk-on) vs DXY strength and VIX spike (risk-off). News shows ETF inflows providing support, but macro uncertainty dominates. This is a priced-in mixed narrative with no new impulse to change the bear structure. 【Qlib Ratings】BNB (0.1002) and BTC (0.0982) are relatively strongest, but Z-Scores show low volume activity (vol_z all <-1.1). 【Pain Trade】SOL and BNB have high L/S liquidation ratios (6.52 and 2.77), indicating retail long flush, yet prices haven't collapsed, suggesting whale accumulation. ETH's L/S ratio 1.54 is balanced. 【Scenario】Select 'Whale Accumulation' script: in a bear market, use retail panic (high L/S ratios) and whale accumulation signals (e.g., SOL's 24h net inflow) for left-side entries, with strict risk management.

Funding: All coins positive but low (0.0037%-0.0100%), retail longs slightly crowded but not extreme. Liquidations: SOL and BNB have high L/S ratios (6.52 and 2.77), retail longs flushed; BTC L/S ratio 3.67 also high.

Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all <-1.1 (e.g., SOL -1.48), indicating significantly low activity; Funding Z-Scores 0.31-1.2, no extreme deviations.

Verdict: WHALE_ACCUMULATION – price dropping, whales accumulating (SOL) and retail longs flushed, but RSI not extreme, suitable for left-side entry.

Combined with 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB show clear long liquidation risks (L/S ratio >3), but no extreme RSI or clear whale accumulation signals are present, placing the market in a post-liquidation balance phase with partial fuel burned. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), but awaiting whale confirmation or extreme RSI.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（40-60），ADX中等（<30），NATR中等，无极端动量；2) 上下影线比率显示部分支撑（SOL下影线43%，BNB下影线28%），但未达0.3阈值；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL为7.12，BNB为3.03，BTC为3.43，显示多头被大量清洗，燃料已消耗；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流出，SOL流入但矛盾，无明确积累。最终判断：SAFE_MR（安全均值回归）——市场处于爆仓后的平衡，RSI未极端，鲸鱼信号不明确，避免追涨杀跌。

Final verdict: SAFE_MR (Safe Mean Reversion) – market in post-liquidation balance, RSI not extreme, whale signals unclear, avoid chasing moves.

Price action aligns with macro sentiment, no new impulse drivers, likely priced in. Qlib rankings show BNB (0.0623 score) and BTC (0.0567 score) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate significantly low volume across all coins (vol_z < -1.5), suggesting poor liquidity. Combining 【Pain Trade】, ETH and BTC show LONG_FLUSH (L/S ratio >3), but RSI is not extreme (56.04/53.25), lacking clear reversal signals; SOL and BNB have balanced liquidation ratios, limited fuel. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), seeking smart money accumulation signals from whale data, but must strictly adhere to bear regime rules (bias short, longs only with extreme accumulation).

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市格局（价格低于SMA200），宏观风险偏好下降（DXY走强，VIX飙升），但Layer 2叙事提供部分支撑。价格走势与宏观环境基本一致，属于已定价状态，无明显新驱动力。Qlib排名显示BTC（0.1298）和ETH（0.0922）相对最强，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-1.5），市场活跃度不足。结合【痛苦交易】分析，SOL和BNB存在明显的轧空燃料（L/S比率分别为0.18和0.01），但当前RSI处于中性区间（57-59），未达到极端值，需等待右侧确认信号。选择【假设分析】中的“鲸鱼轧空”剧本，优先关注SOL和BNB的潜在轧空机会，但严格遵守熊市规则（仅限极端信号+低杠杆）。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with declining risk appetite (DXY strengthening, VIX spiking), though Layer 2 narratives provide some support. Price action aligns with the macro environment, indicating it's largely priced in with no new catalysts. Qlib rankings show BTC (0.1298) and ETH (0.0922) as relatively strongest, but Z-Scores indicate low volume activity (vol_z all <-1.5). 【Pain Trade】 analysis reveals squeeze fuel in SOL and BNB (L/S ratios 0.18 and 0.01), but RSI is neutral (57-59), not extreme, requiring right-side confirmation. Selected 【Scenario】 is 'Whale Squeeze', focusing on SOL and BNB potential, but strictly adhering to bear market rules (only extreme signals + low leverage).

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (52-63), ADX moderate (20-25), NATR moderate; 2) Wick Ratios: SOL upper 19%/lower 4% (strong support), BNB upper 27%/lower 36% (balanced); 3) L/S Liquidation Ratios: SOL 0.18 (short crowded), BNB 0.01 (extreme short crowded), BTC 2.79 (long crowded); 4) Whale Net Flow: SOL inflow (positive), ETH outflow (negative). Verdict: SOL and BNB are WHALE_SQUEEZE due to whale accumulation + extreme short crowding + neutral RSI; BTC is ROCKET due to long crowding + high RSI + high funding.

【痛苦交易与纪律】BTC和SOL存在明显的轧空燃料（L/S比率0.44和0.09），但RSI已超买（BTC 70.6，SOL 66.3），且无鲸鱼流入确认，属于“挡火箭”风险。DOGE排名第一但无鲸鱼数据，仅靠技术面支撑。
【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本：优先考虑有鲸鱼流入证据的ETH（24h流入105万ETH），但需等待RSI回调或明确支撑信号，避免追高。
analysis_summary.en:
【Narrative vs Reality】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but Qlib rankings show DOGE, BTC, ETH as relatively strong, diverging from the macro bearishness. This likely represents a priced-in local rebound rather than a new impulse driver.
【Pain Trade & Discipline】BTC and SOL have clear squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.09), but RSI is overbought (BTC 70.6, SOL 66.3) with no whale inflow confirmation, posing 'ROCKET' risks. DOGE ranks #1 but lacks whale data, relying solely on technicals.
【Scenario Selection】Adopt the 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: prioritize ETH with whale inflow evidence (24h 1.055M ETH), but wait for RSI pullback or clear support signals to avoid chasing.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：多数币种RSI在66-71区间（超买边缘），ADX 18-23（趋势中等），NATR 1.78%-3.15%（波动正常）。DOGE RSI 68.9最高，但无鲸鱼数据；BTC RSI 70.6最超买。
technical_signal.en: Technicals: Most coins have RSI in 66-71 range (near overbought), ADX 18-23 (moderate trend), NATR 1.78%-3.15% (normal volatility). DOGE has highest RSI 68.9 but no whale data; BTC most overbought at RSI 70.6.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH有显著流入（24h 105万ETH），但稳定币流出377万美元；SOL流入193万SOL，但情绪分负值（-0.23）。资金费率：DOGE最高0.0100%（多头拥挤），BTC最低0.0004%（中性）。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: ETH shows significant inflow (24h 1.055M ETH) but stablecoin outflow $3.777M; SOL inflow 1.938M SOL but sentiment negative (-0.23). Funding: DOGE highest at 0.0100% (crowded longs), BTC lowest at 0.0004% (neutral).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：DOGE（0.2966）第一，BTC（0.2652）第二，ETH（0.2294）第三。Z-Score异常：DOGE资金费率Z 1.44（显著正偏差），BTC成交量Z -1.27（低活跃度），SOL成交量Z -1.44（最低）。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: DOGE (0.2966) #1, BTC (0.2652) #2, ETH (0.2294) #3. Z-Score anomalies: DOGE funding Z 1.44 (significant positive deviation), BTC volume Z -1.27 (low activity), SOL volume Z -1.44 (lowest).

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) RSI普遍66+（超买），ADX 18-23（趋势中等），NATR正常；2) 上下影线比率：SOL上影40%/下影26%（有阻力），BTC下影39%（支撑强）；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC 0.44，SOL 0.09（轧空燃料）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流入但稳定币流出，SOL流入但情绪负。结论：ROCKET（挡火箭风险）— RSI超买且无鲸鱼强力确认，追涨危险。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Assessment: 1) RSI generally 66+ (overbought), ADX 18-23 (moderate trend), NATR normal; 2) Wick ratios: SOL upper 40%/lower 26% (resistance), BTC lower 39% (strong support); 3) L/S ratios: BTC 0.44, SOL 0.09 (squeeze fuel); 4) Whale net flow: ETH inflow but stablecoin outflow, SOL inflow but negative sentiment. Verdict: ROCKET — overbought RSI without strong whale confirmation makes chasing risky.

portfolio_status.en: Portfolio status: No positions. Available cash $3942, risk limit: max $78.85 per trade (2% NAV).

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：避免在高RSI时追涨，即使有轧空燃料；当前市场类似，需等待更安全的右侧信号。
reflection.en: Learned from history: Avoid chasing rallies at high RSI even with squeeze fuel; current market is similar, wait for safer right-side entry signals.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于矛盾状态：宏观层面呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但Layer 2新闻极度看涨（ETF流入、监管绿灯）。价格反应显示这些利好可能已部分定价，因为主要币种仍处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），且RSI普遍偏高（65-70），表明上涨动能可能衰竭。参考【Qlib排名】，DOGE（排名第一）和BTC（排名第二）显示相对强势，但DOGE的RSI 68.5和资金费率Z-Score 1.44（偏高）暗示零售追涨风险。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC和SOL的爆仓比（L/S=0.44和0.10）显示空头挤压燃料充足，但RSI均高于65，不符合左侧买入规则（RSI<30或4H下影线确认）。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：关注鲸鱼积累信号（如ETH的Token净流入105万ETH），但需等待技术面确认以避免追高。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a contradictory state: macro signals risk-off (strong DXY, high VIX), but Layer 2 news is overwhelmingly bullish (ETF inflows, regulatory green lights). Price action suggests these positives may be partially priced in, as major coins remain in bear markets (price < SMA200) with elevated RSI (65-70), indicating potential exhaustion. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's RSI 68.5 and funding Z-Score 1.44 (high) suggest retail FOMO risk. Combining 【Pain Trade】, BTC and SOL have high short squeeze fuel (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.10), but RSI above 65 violates left-side entry rules (RSI<30 or 4H lower wick confirmation). Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): monitor whale accumulation signals (e.g., ETH's token net inflow 1.055M ETH), but await technical confirmation to avoid chasing.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI偏高（65-70），处于超买边缘；ADX中等（18-23），趋势强度一般；NATR在2-3%之间，波动率适中。BTC和SOL的爆仓比显示空头挤压潜力，但RSI未达极端水平。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have elevated RSI (65-70), near overbought; ADX moderate (18-23), trend strength modest; NATR 2-3%, volatility moderate. BTC and SOL show short squeeze potential via liquidation ratios, but RSI not at extremes.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH显示Token净流入105万ETH（24h vs 7d持平），但稳定币净流出377万美元，表明鲸鱼可能换仓而非纯积累。SOL的Token净流入193万SOL，但情绪评分负值（-0.23），暗示潜在抛压。资金费率：DOGE最高（0.0100%），Z-Score 1.44，零售多头拥挤；BTC最低（0.0002%），Z-Score -0.39，相对中性。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH shows token net inflow 1.055M ETH (24h vs 7d flat), but stablecoin net outflow $3.777M, suggesting whale rotation rather than pure accumulation. SOL has token net inflow 1.938M SOL, but sentiment score negative (-0.23), indicating potential distribution. Funding: DOGE highest (0.0100%), Z-Score 1.44, retail long crowded; BTC lowest (0.0002%), Z-Score -0.39, relatively neutral.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第一（得分0.2892），但RSI 68.5和资金费率Z-Score 1.44显示统计偏差——零售追涨可能导致回调。BTC排名第二（得分0.2623），资金费率Z-Score -0.39正常，但爆仓比0.44提供挤压燃料。成交量Z-Score普遍负值（-1.05至-1.49），表明市场参与度低，上涨缺乏量能支撑。
quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib ranks DOGE first (score 0.2892), but RSI 68.5 and funding Z-Score 1.44 show statistical deviation—retail FOMO may lead to pullback. BTC ranks second (score 0.2623), funding Z-Score -0.39 normal, but liquidation ratio 0.44 provides squeeze fuel. Volume Z-Scores negative across board (-1.05 to -1.49), indicating low participation and weak volume support for rallies.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 65-70偏高但未超72，ADX 18-23中等，NATR 2-3%正常；2) 上下影线比率：DOGE上影46%/下影22%显示上方阻力，SOL上影40%/下影16%类似；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC和SOL空头主导（L/S=0.44和0.10），但RSI>65，不符合均值回归买入条件；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH和SOLToken流入，但稳定币流出或情绪负值，非明确积累。最终判断：ROCKET（挡火箭风险）——RSI偏高、爆仓燃料存在，但无RSI极端或明确鲸鱼积累确认，追涨风险高。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 65-70 elevated but not >72, ADX 18-23 moderate, NATR 2-3% normal; 2) Wick Ratios: DOGE upper 46%/lower 22% shows overhead resistance, SOL similar (40%/16%); 3) Liquidation Ratios: BTC and SOL short-dominated (L/S=0.44 and 0.10), but RSI>65 violates mean reversion buy rules; 4) Whale Net Flow: ETH and SOL token inflows but stablecoin outflows or negative sentiment, not clear accumulation. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk)—elevated RSI with squeeze fuel, but no RSI extreme or confirmed whale accumulation, chasing longs is risky.

analysis_summary.zh:

【痛苦交易与燃料】BTC和SOL存在明显轧空燃料（L/S爆仓比0.19和0.10），但RSI已超买（BTC 72.9，SOL 68.1），且无鲸鱼流入确认（SOL 24h情绪-0.23 vs 7d -0.22），表明上涨可能由空头平仓推动而非新资金。
【假设剧本】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本：等待SOL突破前高$93.14确认右侧入场，避免在RSI高位追涨。
【纪律】遵守4D规则：不逆流动性（爆仓比失衡时等待），检查资金费率陷阱（SOL资金费率0.0042%中性）。
analysis_summary.en:
【Narrative vs Reality】Market is in bear regime (price < SMA200), but Qlib ranks DOGE/BTC/ETH as strongest, diverging from macro fear (BTC Fear Greed 10). This suggests a priced-in bounce rather than new impulse.
【Pain Trade & Fuel】BTC and SOL have clear squeeze fuel (L/S liquidation ratios 0.19 and 0.10), but RSI is overbought (BTC 72.9, SOL 68.1) and no whale inflow confirmation (SOL 24h sentiment -0.23 vs 7d -0.22), indicating move driven by short covering not new capital.
【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: Await SOL breakout above prior high $93.14 for right-side confirmation, avoid chasing at high RSI.
【Discipline】Follow 4D rules: Don't fight liquidity (wait during imbalanced liquidations), check funding trap (SOL funding 0.0042% neutral).

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on 4E: 1) RSI state: BTC 72.9 >70 overbought, SOL 68.1 near overbought; ADX: BTC 20.4, SOL 20.1 (moderate trend); NATR: BTC 2.15%, SOL 3.03% (normal volatility). 2) Wick ratio: SOL upper 73%/lower 0% (shows overhead resistance). 3) Liquidation ratio: BTC L/S=0.19, SOL L/S=0.10 (short dominated). 4) Whale flow: SOL 24h sentiment negative (-0.23) and lower than 7d (-0.22), no accumulation signal. Verdict: ROCKET — RSI high and trend up, shorting against momentum dangerous; but no whale confirmation, chasing longs also risky.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但宏观新闻（特朗普支持加密改革）与价格走势出现分歧——利好消息并未推动价格突破，表明可能已定价或存在抛压。Qlib排名显示DOGE（第1）和BTC（第2）相对强势，但DOGE的成交量Z-Score高达1.44（异常活跃），结合其高RSI（70.12）和正资金费率（0.0100%），暗示零售追涨风险。痛苦交易方面，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均显示SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（空头爆仓远多于多头），但RSI普遍偏高（60-72），缺乏低RSI支撑，根据战场纪律，禁止在RSI>40时追多反弹。选择【假设分析】剧本3（鲸鱼前置）：优先关注鲸鱼持续积累的SOL（24h代币净流入193.8万SOL），但需等待右侧突破确认，避免左侧接飞刀。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but there's a divergence between macro news (Trump supporting crypto reform) and price action—bullish news hasn't driven breakouts, suggesting it may be priced in or facing distribution. Qlib rankings show DOGE (1st) and BTC (2nd) as relatively strong, but DOGE's volume Z-Score is high at 1.44 (abnormally active), coupled with high RSI (70.12) and positive funding (0.0100%), indicating retail FOMO risk. For pain trades, BTC, ETH, SOL, and BNB all show SHORT_SQUEEZE signals (short liquidations >> longs), but RSI is generally elevated (60-72), lacking low RSI support—per tactical discipline, avoid chasing longs with RSI > 40. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): focus on SOL with sustained whale accumulation (24h token net inflow 1.938M SOL), but await right-side breakout confirmation to prevent left-side entry.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：主要币种RSI处于60-72（超买边缘），ADX普遍低于25（趋势不强），NATR在1.83%-3.22%（中等波动）。DOGE的RSI最高（70.12），但ADX仅15.6，显示动量不足。SOL的RSI为63.7，ADX 18.4，处于上升趋势但未超强。

Funding: DOGE, BNB positive (0.0100%), retail long; BTC, SOL negative (-0.0007% to -0.0010%), retail short. Liquidation ratio: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB have very low L/S ratios (0.01-0.44), short liquidations dominate, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第1（得分0.4396），但成交量Z-Score 1.44显著偏高，结合高RSI和正资金费率，可能为零售推动的虚假强势。BTC排名第2（得分0.332），资金费率Z-Score -0.62（负偏差），显示零售看空，但RSI 72.09超买，矛盾信号。SOL排名第5（得分0.2353），资金费率Z-Score 0.17接近中性，但鲸鱼流入显著，量化模型可能低估其潜力。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: DOGE ranks 1st (score 0.4396), but volume Z-Score 1.44 is significantly high, coupled with high RSI and positive funding, possibly retail-driven false strength. BTC ranks 2nd (score 0.332), funding Z-Score -0.62 (negative deviation), indicating retail bearishness, but RSI 72.09 is overbought—contradictory signals. analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场呈现矛盾信号：宏观层面VIX飙升（20.84）与DXY走强（98.8）显示风险规避情绪，但日元疲软（USD/JPY 156.9）和特朗普支持加密的新闻又带来风险偏好。价格行为显示为已定价——积极新闻未推动价格突破，表明上涨动能不足。参考Qlib排名，DOGE（排名1）和BTC（排名2）相对强势，但DOGE的Funding Z-Score高达1.44（统计显著偏高），暗示零售多头拥挤。结合痛苦交易分析，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均显示SHORT_SQUEEZE信号（L/S比率极低），但RSI均未低于30，缺乏安全均值回归条件。选择假设剧本3（Whale Front-Run），聚焦鲸鱼持续积累的SOL（24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL），但需等待右侧突破确认以避免左侧风险。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market shows conflicting signals: macro VIX spike (20.84) and DXY strength (98.8) indicate risk-off sentiment, but JPY weakness (USD/JPY 156.9) and Trump's crypto-supportive news provide risk-on catalysts. Price action suggests priced-in—positive news hasn't driven breakout, indicating weak upward momentum. Per Qlib rankings, DOGE (rank 1) and BTC (rank 2) show relative strength, but DOGE's Funding Z-Score of 1.44 (statistically high) signals crowded retail longs. Pain trade analysis reveals SHORT_SQUEEZE signals for BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB (low L/S ratios), but RSI not below 30, lacking safe mean-reversion conditions. Selected Scenario 3 (Whale Front-Run), focusing on SOL with sustained whale accumulation (24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL), but awaiting right-side breakout confirmation to avoid left-side risk.

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种处于熊市（价格<SMA200），日线趋势看跌。4H RSI普遍在63-72（超买区域），ADX 15-22（趋势偏弱），NATR 1.8-3.2%（中等波动）。BTC RSI 72.3最高，接近超买；SOL RSI 63.6相对较低。上下影线显示SOL下影线比率34%（支撑迹象），BTC上影线比率13%（阻力较小）。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins in bear market (price < SMA200), daily trend bearish. 4H RSI ranges 63-72 (overbought), ADX 15-22 (weak trend), NATR 1.8-3.2% (moderate volatility). BTC RSI 72.3 highest, nearing overbought; SOL RSI 63.6 relatively lower. Wick ratios show SOL lower wick 34% (support signs), BTC upper wick 13% (less resistance).

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h Token Net Flow 1.06M ETH（积极），但Stablecoin Net Flow -$3.78M（流出）。SOL 24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL（显著积累），Stablecoin Net Flow $831k（流入）。资金费率：DOGE、BNB为0.0100%（偏高），ETH 0.0081%，BTC 0.0012%，SOL -0.0022%（轻微负值）。爆仓痛苦：BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB的L/S比率极低（0.07-0.40），显示空头爆仓主导，存在轧空燃料。
macro_onchain.en: Whale data: ETH 24h Token Net Flow 1.06M ETH (positive), but Stablecoin Net Flow -$3.78M (outflow). SOL 24h Token Net Flow 1.94M SOL (significant accumulation), Stablecoin Net Flow $831k (inflow). Funding rates: DOGE, BNB at 0.0100% (high), ETH 0.0081%, BTC 0.0012%, SOL -0.0022% (slightly negative). Liquidation pain: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB have very low L/S ratios (0.07-0.40), indicating short liquidations dominate, providing squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib分析：DOGE排名第1（得分0.3207），但Funding Z-Score 1.44显著偏高，统计异常表明零售多头过度拥挤，风险较高。BTC排名第2（得分0.3048），Funding Z-Score -0.16接近中性。SOL排名第5（得分0.2097），但鲸鱼积累强劲（Token Net Flow高），形成量化与链上数据的背离。成交量Z-Score普遍为负（-0.18至-1.10），显示市场参与度低。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib analysis: DOGE ranks 1st (score 0.3207), but Funding Z-Score 1.44 significantly high, statistical anomaly indicates overcrowded retail longs, high risk. BTC ranks 2nd (score 0.3048), Funding Z-Score -0.16 near neutral. SOL ranks 5th (score 0.2097), but strong whale accumulation (high Token Net Flow), creating divergence between quant and on-chain data. Volume Z-Scores negative (-0.18 to -1.10), indicating low market participation.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 63-72（超买区域），ADX 15-22（趋势弱），NATR 1.8-3.2%（中等波动）；2) 上下影线比率：SOL下影线34%（支撑），BTC上影线13%（阻力弱）；3) 多空爆仓比：L/S比率极低（0.07-0.40），空头爆仓主导；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL Token Net Flow积极（1.94M SOL），但ETH Stablecoin流出。综合判断：当前市场处于ROCKET（挡火箭风险）状态——RSI超买但趋势弱，空头爆仓提供上涨燃料，但缺乏安全均值回归条件（RSI未>72或<28）。禁止盲目做空或追高。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 63-72 (overbought), ADX 15-22 (weak trend), NATR 1.8-3.2% (moderate volatility); 2) Wick ratios: SOL lower wick 34% (support), BTC upper wick 13% (weak resistance); 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: very low (0.07-0.40), short liquidations dominate; 4) Whale net flow: SOL Token Net Flow positive (1.94M SOL), but ETH Stablecoin outflow. Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk)—RSI overbought but trend weak, short liquidations provide upward fuel, but lacking safe mean-reversion conditions (RSI not >72 or <28). Avoid blind shorting or chasing highs.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于矛盾状态：宏观层面呈现风险规避（DXY走强，VIX高位），但Layer 2新闻极度看涨，形成叙事分歧。价格走势与鲸鱼行为显示关键信号：BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB均处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但所有币种都出现【SHORT_SQUEEZE】信号（空头爆仓远高于多头），尤其是BTC空头爆仓高达$1.6B（L/S比率0.10），表明零售空头过度拥挤。Qlib排名显示BTC（#1）和ETH（#2）相对最强，但它们的资金费率Z-Score（0.42和1.16）未达极端，而DOGE的资金费率Z-Score高达1.42（统计显著偏高），暗示零售多头过热。结合【痛苦交易】分析：当前空头爆仓是主要燃料，但RSI普遍在60-72区间（未超买），且无明确4H上影线拒绝，因此不宜立即做空；同时，价格未出现大幅下跌，缺乏左侧买入信号。选择【Whale Front-Run】剧本：关注鲸鱼持续积累的币种（如SOL 24h净流入1.9M代币），等待右侧突破确认。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a contradictory state: macro signals risk-off (DXY strengthening, VIX high), but Layer 2 news is overwhelmingly bullish, creating a narrative divergence. Price action and whale data reveal key signals: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB are all in bear markets (price < SMA200), but all show 【SHORT_SQUEEZE】 signals (short liquidations far exceed longs), especially BTC with $1.6B short liquidations (L/S ratio 0.10), indicating overcrowded retail shorts. Qlib rankings show BTC (#1) and ETH (#2) as relatively strongest, but their funding Z-Scores (0.42 and 1.16) are not extreme, while DOGE's funding Z-Score is high at 1.42 (statistically significant), suggesting overheated retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】 analysis: current short liquidations are the primary fuel, but RSI is generally in the 60-72 range (not overbought), and no clear 4H upper wick rejections are present, so shorting immediately is not justified; meanwhile, prices haven't dropped significantly, lacking left-side buy signals. Selected 【Whale Front-Run】 scenario: focus on coins with sustained whale accumulation (e.g., SOL with 24h net inflow of 1.9M tokens), awaiting right-side breakout confirmation.

Funding rates: DOGE (0.0098%) and BNB (0.0100%) are high, indicating crowded retail longs; SOL is negative (-0.0021%), slightly crowded retail shorts. Liquidation data shows short liquidations far exceed longs across all coins (L/S ratios: BTC 0.10, ETH 0.39, SOL 0.12, BNB 0.01), creating squeeze fuel.

quantitative_analysis.zh: 分析Qlib排名：BTC（得分0.2915，排名#1）和ETH（0.2777，排名#2）相对最强，但它们的资金费率Z-Score（0.42和1.16）未达统计极端（>2），表明资金费率异常不显著。DOGE排名#3，但资金费率Z-Score高达1.42，接近显著水平，结合高资金费率（0.0098%），提示零售多头过热风险。SOL排名#5（得分0.2064），但鲸鱼积累强劲，形成量化与链上数据的背离。
quantitative_analysis.en: Analyze Qlib rankings: BTC (score 0.2915, rank #1) and ETH (0.2777, rank #2) are relatively strongest, but their funding Z-Scores (0.42 and 1.16) are not statistically extreme (>2), indicating funding anomalies are not significant. DOGE ranks #3, but its funding Z-Score is high at 1.42, nearing significance, combined with high funding rate (0.0098%), suggesting overheated retail long risk. SOL ranks #5 (score 0.2064), but has strong whale accumulation, creating a divergence between quantitative and on-chain data.

regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI in 63-72 (not overbought), ADX <25 (trend not strong), NATR moderate (1.82%-3.19%); 2) Wick ratios: BTC has 71% lower wicks (strong support), but no upper wick rejections; 3) Liquidation L/S ratios: short liquidations far exceed longs (all ratios <0.5), indicating shorts being squeezed; 4) Whale net flow: SOL shows significant inflow, ETH has stablecoin outflow. Verdict: No 【KNIFE】 risk (price not dropping sharply, RSI not <30), no 【ROCKET】 risk (RSI not >70, ADX not high), but not 【SAFE_MR】 either (RSI not extreme, no clear reversal candles). Market is neutral-strong, awaiting right-side signals.

analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a macro risk-off environment (VIX 20.51, DXY 98.77), but political narratives (Trump's crypto support) and regulatory progress (Kraken Fed account) provide positive catalysts, creating a divergence. Price action shows a mixed trend with no clear new impulse, likely priced in. Referencing 【Qlib rankings】, BTC (0.2399) and ETH (0.2303) are relatively strongest, but all coins have RSI in the overbought 60-68 range, and Z-Scores indicate high funding rates (ETH 1.0, DOGE 1.25), signaling crowded retail longs. Combining 【Pain Trade】, all major coins show SHORT_SQUEEZE signals (extremely low L/S ratios: BTC 0.15, ETH 0.45, SOL 0.15, BNB 0.01), but RSI is not extreme (>70) and ADX is generally <20 (weak trend), placing us in the 【Tactical Discipline】'rocket blocking' risk zone—avoid chasing highs. Selected 【Scenario】: Wait for mean reversion opportunities, avoid opening positions at overheated RSI.

Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk), because RSI is overheated, ADX weak, high funding rates indicate crowded retail longs, but short squeeze fuel may drive further upside, making counter-trend shorts or chasing longs high-risk.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场呈现宏观避险（DXY走强、VIX高位）与加密叙事看涨（特朗普支持、机构入场）的背离，属于已定价的利好，需警惕利好出尽风险。Qlib排名显示BTC/ETH相对最强，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-1.4），市场活跃度不足。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC/ETH/BNB/DOGE均出现极端空头爆仓（L/S比率<0.25），形成轧空燃料，但RSI均>65且无显著下影线，追多风险高。选择【均值回归】剧本，等待RSI超买回调或明确支撑信号。
analysis_summary.en: Narrative vs Reality Check: The market shows divergence between macro risk-off (strong DXY, high VIX) and crypto-specific bullish narratives (Trump support, institutional adoption), indicating priced-in positives with risk of exhaustion. Qlib ranks BTC/ETH strongest, but Z-Scores show universally low volume (vol_z all <-1.4), signaling weak participation. Pain Trade analysis reveals extreme short liquidations (L/S ratios <0.25 for BTC/ETH/BNB/DOGE), providing squeeze fuel, but RSI >65 with no clear lower wicks makes chasing longs dangerous. Selected Scenario: Mean Reversion, awaiting overbought pullback or clear support signals.

Liquidation Ratios: Short liquidations dominate for BTC/ETH/BNB (L/S ratios 0.01-0.22), high squeeze risk.

Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores all negative (-1.43 to -1.83), significantly below historical mean, indicating weak volume support for rallies; Funding Z-Scores positive for most (0.73-1.21 except SOL), statistically high, confirming retail long overheating.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) RSI 65-71（超买但未极端>72），ADX 15-22（趋势弱），NATR中等；2) 下影线比率低（ETH 37%，SOL 12%），无显著支撑；3) 空头爆仓远多于多头（L/S比率0.01-0.22），但价格未跌反涨，显示轧空驱动；4) 鲸鱼净流向混合（ETH/SOL代币流入但稳定币流出）。结论：ROCKET（挡火箭风险）——当前上涨由空头爆仓燃料推动，RSI超买且无回调信号，追多易被套在高点。
regime_safety.en: Required Assessment: 1) RSI 65-71 (overbought but not extreme >72), ADX 15-22 (weak trend), NATR moderate; 2) Lower wick ratios low (ETH 37%, SOL 12%), no clear support; 3) Short liquidations dominate (L/S ratios 0.01-0.22) but price rising, indicating squeeze-driven move; 4) Whale net flows mixed (ETH/SOL token inflow but stablecoin outflow). Verdict: ROCKET (blocking rocket risk) – current rally fueled by short squeezes, RSI overbought with no pullback signals, chasing longs risks buying at tops.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），但存在明显的鲸鱼与散户分歧。宏观环境显示风险规避（VIX飙升、DXY走强），但加密货币内部出现轧空燃料（BTC、ETH、BNB的短仓爆仓远高于长仓）。【Qlib排名】显示BTC（排名1）和BNB（排名2）相对强势，但Z-Score异常：BTC资金费率Z-Score为-0.07（轻微负值），BNB为0.89（正值），表明散户在BNB上做多拥挤，在BTC上略微做空。【痛苦交易】BTC、ETH、BNB的短仓爆仓比（L/S）极低（0.05、0.04、0.02），显示大量散户短仓被清算，为轧空提供燃料，但价格尚未突破关键阻力，需等待右侧确认。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本：鲸鱼在价格下跌时积累（如ETH的24h情绪得分0.01高于7d的0.04），而散户恐慌性短仓被爆，可能引发轧空反弹。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), but there is a clear divergence between whales and retail. Macro shows risk-off (VIX spiking, DXY strengthening), but crypto internal signals show squeeze fuel (short liquidations far exceed longs for BTC, ETH, BNB).【Qlib Ratings】indicate BTC (rank 1) and BNB (rank 2) are relatively strong, but Z-Score anomalies: BTC funding Z-Score is -0.07 (slightly negative), BNB is 0.89 (positive), showing retail longs crowded in BNB and slight shorts in BTC.【Pain Trade】Short liquidation ratios (L/S) for BTC, ETH, BNB are extremely low (0.05, 0.04, 0.02), indicating massive retail short liquidations providing squeeze fuel, but price hasn't broken key resistance—await right-side confirmation.【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario: whales accumulating on dips (e.g., ETH's 24h sentiment 0.01 > 7d 0.04) while retail shorts are being liquidated, potentially triggering a squeeze bounce.

Verdict: Market is in 【KNIFE】risk (falling knife) — ADX<20 and trendless, prohibit new directional positions; await ADX>20 or right-side confirmation (e.g., 4H breakout).

Integrating 【Pain Trade】, SOL has squeeze fuel (negative funding, L/S ratio 2.93 favoring long flush), but requires right-side confirmation; ETH has slightly positive funding and whale outflows, lacking upward momentum. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run), focusing on divergence between whale accumulation and retail panic.

BTC and ETH show massive long liquidations (L/S ratios 4.94 and 9.54), indicating retail long flush, but whale data lacks strong accumulation (ETH 24h net outflow 2.47M coins, SOL 24h inflow 9.8K coins but weak 7d trend). 【Pain Trade】Extreme long liquidations in BTC/ETH provide downside fuel, but no RSI<30 oversold extremes or long lower wicks confirming support—this is 'falling knife' risk. 【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' scenario but require right-side confirmation.

Funding Z-Scores: BNB (-1.91) and DOGE (-1.78) show significant negative deviations, SOL (-0.58) mildly negative, BTC (1.01) positive. Statistically, BNB and DOGE's negative funding anomalies are notable, suggesting squeeze potential, but require trend confirmation.

Verdict: KNIFE (falling knife risk)—market in bear regime, ADX<20 trendless, RSI not oversold, heavy long liquidations may drive further downside, whales not accumulating significantly, left-side longs dangerous.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在ADX < 20时开仓易被震荡止损，必须等待右侧确认；轧空机会需结合鲸鱼积累和爆仓燃料。本次决策强调等待突破前高以降低风险。
reflection.en: Learned from history: Opening positions when ADX < 20 leads to whipsaw stops; must wait for right-side confirmation. Squeeze opportunities require combining whale accumulation and liquidation fuel. This decision emphasizes waiting for break above prior high to reduce risk.

entry_reason.en: Based on Whale Front-Run scenario: 1) Whale accumulation accelerating (24h sentiment 0.71 vs 7d 0.12, token net inflow 9,848.3 SOL); 2) Retail shorts crowded (funding -0.0045%); 3) Short liquidations dominate (L/S ratio 0.36), providing squeeze fuel; 4) Technicals show support (lower wick ratio 35%/47%). Await right-side confirmation: enter after price breaks above 4H prior high $86.0.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格未能突破$86.0或跌破$82.0（基于NATR 2.91% × 1.5 ≈ 4.37%止损距离），则放弃交易。

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观环境呈现风险规避（DXY走强、VIX上升），但日元疲软暗示部分风险偏好。鲸鱼数据显示SOL和BNB存在显著轧空燃料（L/S比率分别为0.44和0.17），而ETH呈现多头清算风险（L/S比率2.62）。【Qlib排名】显示BTC和BNB相对最强（排名1-2），但Z-Score异常显示成交量普遍低迷（所有币种vol_z < -1.6），表明市场参与度不足。【痛苦交易】SOL和BNB的短期清算比率极低（<0.5），配合负资金费率（SOL -0.0056%），形成轧空机会；ETH则有多头清算风险，需避免追涨。【假设分析】选择“鲸鱼前置”剧本，基于SOL的鲸鱼加速积累（24h情绪0.84 vs 7d 0.12）和轧空信号，在右侧确认后开多。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200), with a risk-off macro backdrop (DXY strengthening, VIX rising), but Yen weakness suggests some risk appetite. Whale data shows significant short-squeeze fuel in SOL and BNB (L/S ratios 0.44 and 0.17), while ETH has long liquidation risk (L/S ratio 2.62).【Qlib Ratings】indicate BTC and BNB are relatively strongest (ranks 1-2), but Z-Score anomalies show universally low volume (all vol_z < -1.6), signaling weak participation.【Pain Trade】SOL and BNB have extreme low short liquidation ratios (<0.5) coupled with negative funding (SOL -0.0056%), creating squeeze opportunities; ETH has long flush risk, avoid chasing.【Scenario】Select 'Whale Front-Run' script, based on SOL's accelerated whale accumulation (24h sentiment 0.84 vs 7d 0.12) and squeeze signals, with right-side confirmation for a long entry.

Qlib rankings show BTC (#1) and BNB (#2) as relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate all coins have significantly low volume (vol_z < -1.5), suggesting thin liquidity prone to whale manipulation. Integrating 【Pain Trade】, SOL and BNB show clear short-squeeze signals (L/S ratios 0.43 and 0.13), but caution is needed due to ADX < 20 (no clear trend) risking false breakouts. Selected 【Scenario】3 (Whale Front-Run): prioritize SOL's whale accumulation (24h sentiment 0.83 > 7d 0.12) and squeeze fuel, but strictly await right-side confirmation.

quantitative_analysis.en: Quantitative Analysis: Qlib ranks BTC #1 (score 0.1167), but volume Z-Score is anomalously low (-1.58), indicating weak liquidity backing the strength. SOL ranks #4 (score 0.0611), but funding Z-Score is positive (0.24), slightly diverging from negative actual funding, possibly statistical noise. Overall Z-Scores show market abnormally quiet (all vol_z < -1.5), increasing whale manipulation risk.

Z-Scores indicate low volume (vol_z -1.38 to -1.73) and funding anomalies: DOGE (1.3) and SOL (0.82) positive (crowded retail longs); BTC (-1.03) negative (crowded retail shorts). 【Pain Trade】BTC and ETH show clear SHORT_SQUEEZE signals (L/S ratios 0.18 and 0.30), but RSI is not below 30 and no clear 4H lower wick support, indicating 'fuel present but no trigger'. SOL and BNB have balanced L/S ratios (1.19 and 0.48), no extreme liquidation rush. 【Scenario】Selected 'Whale Front-Run': Based on whale data, SOL shows sharp accumulation in 24h (24h sentiment 0.84 vs 7d 0.16, token net inflow 22,392.4 SOL) while price drops, forming bullish divergence, but requires right-side confirmation.

Verdict: KNIFE (falling knife risk) because ADX<20 (weak trend), RSI not oversold, and whale flows diverge (SOL accumulating but others distributing), making blind longs/shorts prone to whipsaw. Wait for ADX>20 or clear right-side confirmation.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观呈现风险规避信号（DXY走强、VIX高位），但Layer 2消息中性偏积极。价格下跌与鲸鱼行为出现关键分歧：SOL显示24小时情绪得分0.79远高于7天0.20，且代币净流入184,563 SOL，表明鲸鱼在价格下跌中加速吸筹，而零售端因负资金费率（-0.0075%）和大量多头清算（L/S比率2.69）正在恐慌性抛售，形成典型的“鲸鱼陷阱”信号。Qlib排名将SOL列为第2（得分0.0115），但成交量Z-Score异常低（-2.29），显示市场参与度不足，这可能放大轧空潜力。结合【痛苦交易】分析，SOL存在明确的轧空燃料（拥挤的零售空头+多头清算），但必须等待右侧确认以避免接飞刀。选择【假设分析】剧本3：鲸鱼抢先交易——跟随智能资金在零售恐慌时积累。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price below SMA200), with macro risk-off signals (strong DXY, high VIX), but Layer 2 news is neutral-to-positive. A key divergence emerges between price action and whale behavior: SOL shows a 24h sentiment score of 0.79 vs 7d 0.20, with token net inflow of 184,563 SOL, indicating accelerated whale accumulation during the price drop, while retail panics with negative funding (-0.0075%) and high long liquidations (L/S ratio 2.69), forming a classic 'whale trap' signal. Qlib ranks SOL #2 (score 0.0115), but volume Z-Score is anomalously low (-2.29), suggesting low market participation that could amplify squeeze potential. Per 【Pain Trade】analysis, SOL has clear squeeze fuel (crowded retail shorts + long flush), but right-side confirmation is required to avoid catching a falling knife. Selected 【Hypothesis】Scenario 3: Whale Front-Run – betting on smart money accumulation amid retail fear.

Liquidation data: 24h long liquidations $2.414M vs short $0.897M, L/S ratio 2.69, indicating heavy retail long flush, providing squeeze fuel.

Anomaly detection: Volume Z-Score -2.29 is significantly below mean, indicating depressed trading activity, which may suggest weak downward momentum prone to reversal on catalysts. Funding Z-Score 0.96 shows funding rate slightly above historical norm but not extreme, combined with negative actual rate, implying crowded shorts but not excessive.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI 50.75（非极端），ADX 14.3（<20，无趋势），NATR 2.81%（中等）；2) 下影线比率40%（较高），显示买盘拒绝；3) 多空爆仓比2.69（多头被清洗）；4) 鲸鱼代币净流向为正（积累）。综合判断：当前非KNIFE（无RSI<30或强烈下跌动量），非ROCKET（无RSI>70或强劲上涨趋势），但ADX<20触发【战场纪律】的“无交易区”规则，禁止开新仓。因此，需等待ADX突破20并出现右侧确认（如突破4H前高）。结论：SAFE_MR条件不满足，因无RSI极端值；当前状态为“等待趋势确认”。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI 50.75 (not extreme), ADX 14.3 (<20, no trend), NATR 2.81% (moderate); 2) Lower wick ratio 40% (high), showing buying rejection; 3) Liquidation L/S ratio 2.69 (longs flushed); 4) Whale token net flow positive (accumulation). Overall verdict: Not KNIFE (no RSI<30 or strong downward momentum), not ROCKET (no RSI>70 or strong uptrend), but ADX<20 triggers the 【Tactical Discipline】'no-trade zone' rule, prohibiting new positions. Thus, must wait for ADX to break above 20 and right-side confirmation (e.g., break above 4H prior high). Conclusion: SAFE_MR conditions not met due to lack of RSI extremes; current state is 'awaiting trend confirmation'.

Verdict: KNIFE (falling knife risk)—price declining with RSI not oversold (>30), ADX<20 no trend, no massive whale accumulation, prohibit left-side longs; not ROCKET (no strong rally). technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI中性（46-55），ADX均<20（无趋势），波动率正常（NATR 1.6-2.9%），上下影线比率显示BNB有较强上影线（55%），SOL有下影线（24%），但无极端拒绝信号。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have neutral RSI (46-55), ADX all <20 (no trend), normal volatility (NATR 1.6-2.9%), wick ratios show BNB with strong upper wick (55%), SOL with lower wick (24%), but no extreme rejection signals.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：SOL显示24h情绪（0.51）高于7d（0.16），代币净流入190k SOL，表明短期积累；ETH和BTC代币净流出，但爆仓比平衡。资金费率：BNB和DOGE较高（0.0100%），SOL和ETH接近中性，无极端拥挤。
macro_onchain.en: Whale flow: SOL shows 24h sentiment (0.51) > 7d (0.16) with token net inflow of 190k SOL, indicating short-term accumulation; ETH and BTC have token net outflows but balanced liquidation ratios. Funding: BNB and DOGE elevated (0.0100%), SOL and ETH near neutral, no extreme crowding.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB（得分0.0567）最强，BTC（0.0337）次之，SOL（0.0283）第三，但所有币种成交量Z-Score显著偏低（-2.0至-2.24），统计异常表明市场参与度不足。资金费率Z-Score：DOGE（1.5）偏高，可能吸引零售多头，但无其他异常。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib rankings: BNB (score 0.0567) strongest, BTC (0.0337) second, SOL (0.0283) third, but all coins show significantly low volume Z-Score (-2.0 to -2.24), statistical anomaly indicating poor market participation. Funding Z-Score: DOGE (1.5) elevated, may attract retail longs, but no other anomalies.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】评估：1) RSI中性（46-55），ADX均<20（无趋势），NATR正常（1.6-2.9%）；2) 上下影线比率：BNB上影线55%（阻力），SOL下影线24%（轻微支撑）；3) 多空爆仓比：SOL和BNB>3（多头爆仓风险），ETH/BTC~1.8（平衡）；4) 鲸鱼净流向：SOL流入（积累），ETH/BTC流出。结论：KNIFE（接飞刀风险）— ADX<20且无明确趋势，RSI非极端，鲸鱼信号混合，立即开仓可能被震荡止损；等待ADX>20或RSI极端+影线确认。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Assessment: 1) RSI neutral (46-55), ADX all <20 (no trend), NATR normal (1.6-2.9%); 2) Wick ratios: BNB upper wick 55% (resistance), SOL lower wick 24% (mild support); 3) Liquidation L/S ratio: SOL and BNB >3 (long flush risk), ETH/BTC ~1.8 (balanced); 4) Whale net flow: SOL inflow (accumulation), ETH/BTC outflow. Verdict: KNIFE — ADX<20 with no clear trend, RSI not extreme, mixed whale signals, immediate entry risks whipsaw; wait for ADX>20 or RSI extreme + wick confirmation.

portfolio_status.zh: 当前持仓：无。风险：可用多头/空头额度各$1872（48%权益），总风险暴露为0，符合熊市偏空但ADX限制的谨慎策略。
portfolio_status.en: Current positions: none. Risk: Available long/short room $1872 each (48% equity), total exposure 0, aligning with bearish bias but cautious due to ADX constraints.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：ADX<20时开仓易被止损（如之前ETH长线在趋势缺失时入场），必须严格遵守【战场纪律】等待趋势确认；鲸鱼积累信号（如SOL）需结合爆仓燃料和右侧突破才可靠。
reflection.en: Learned from history: Entries when ADX<20 lead to stops (e.g., previous ETH long in trendless conditions), must strictly follow 【Tactical Discipline】 to await trend confirmation; whale accumulation signals (e.g., SOL) require liquidation fuel and right-side breakout for reliability.

analysis_summary.zh: 【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市（价格低于SMA200），宏观信号矛盾（美联储降息预期与美元走强），但加密市场极度恐惧（BTC恐惧贪婪指数10）。Qlib排名显示BNB（第1）和SOL（第2）相对强势，但Z-Score显示成交量普遍偏低（vol_z均<-1.88），表明市场流动性不足。结合【痛苦交易】，BTC和ETH存在显著多头爆仓（L/S比率>3.38），显示零售多头被清洗，但鲸鱼数据未显示明确吸筹（ETH 24h净流出207万枚，SOL 24h净流入24万枚但7d趋势更强）。【战场纪律】要求ADX>20才开仓，当前所有币种ADX均<20（14.0-17.8），处于无趋势状态，禁止新开方向性头寸。选择【假设分析】剧本：等待趋势确认（ADX突破20）或极端均值回归信号（RSI<30且鲸鱼吸筹）。
analysis_summary.en: 【Narrative vs Reality Check】The market is in a bear regime (price < SMA200) with mixed macro signals (dovish Fed expectations vs strong DXY) and extreme crypto fear (BTC Fear & Greed: 10). Qlib ranks show BNB (#1) and SOL (#2) as relatively strong, but Z-Scores indicate universally low volume (vol_z all <-1.88), signaling poor liquidity. 【Pain Trade】 analysis reveals significant long liquidations in BTC and ETH (L/S ratios >3.38), indicating retail long flush, but whale data shows no clear accumulation (ETH 24h net outflow 2.07M tokens, SOL 24h net inflow 241.6K tokens but 7d trend is stronger). 【Tactical Discipline】 mandates ADX >20 for new directional positions, yet all coins have ADX <20 (14.0-17.8), indicating trendless conditions—no new directional trades allowed. Selected 【Scenario】: Wait for trend confirmation (ADX >20) or extreme mean reversion signals (RSI <30 with whale accumulation).

technical_signal.zh: 技术面：所有币种RSI中性偏弱（43.5-51.71），ADX均低于20（14.0-17.8），表明无明确趋势。波动率较低（NATR 1.66%-2.86%），布林带宽度收窄。上下影线比率显示部分支撑（BNB下影线12%，ETH上影线57%），但无强烈反转信号。
technical_signal.en: Technical: All coins have neutral-to-weak RSI (43.5-51.71) and ADX below 20 (14.0-17.8), indicating no clear trend. Volatility is low (NATR 1.66%-2.86%) with Bollinger Bands narrowing. Wick ratios show some support (BNB lower wick 12%, ETH upper wick 57%) but no strong reversal signals.

macro_onchain.zh: 鲸鱼数据：ETH 24h净流出207万枚（7d净流出456万枚），显示持续分布；SOL 24h净流入24万枚，但7d净流入158万枚更显著，暗示近期吸筹加速。资金费率：BNB和DOGE为正（0.0098%/0.0052%），零售多头略拥挤；BTC和ETH为负（-0.0014%/-0.0034%），零售空头略多。爆仓：BTC和ETH多头爆仓显著（L/S比率3.38/4.42），零售痛苦明显。
macro_onchain.en: Whale Data: ETH shows 24h net outflow of 2.07M tokens (7d outflow 4.56M), indicating ongoing distribution; SOL has 24h net inflow of 241.6K tokens, but 7d inflow of 1.58M is more significant, suggesting recent accumulation acceleration. Funding Rates: BNB and DOGE are positive (0.0098%/0.0052%), slight retail long crowding; BTC and ETH are negative (-0.0014%/-0.0034%), slight retail short crowding. Liquidations: BTC and ETH have significant long liquidations (L/S ratios 3.38/4.42), showing retail pain.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：BNB（得分0.0211）和SOL（得分0.0002）领先，但得分绝对值低，表明整体市场动能弱。Z-Score异常：成交量Z-Score普遍极低（-2.08至-1.88），统计上显著偏离均值，确认市场参与度不足；资金费率Z-Score中，DOGE（0.76）和BNB（0.73）略高，但未达极端水平（>2），无强烈轧空/轧多信号。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib Rankings: BNB (score 0.0211) and SOL (score 0.0002) lead, but low absolute scores indicate weak overall momentum. Z-Score Anomalies: Volume Z-Scores are universally very low (-2.08 to -1.88), statistically significant deviations confirming low market participation; Funding Z-Scores show DOGE (0.76) and BNB (0.73) slightly elevated but not extreme (>2), no strong squeeze signals.

regime_safety.zh: 【必填】基于Section 4E评估：1) RSI中性（43.5-51.71），ADX均<20（无趋势），NATR中等（1.66%-2.86%）；2) 上下影线比率：BNB下影线12%（弱支撑），ETH上影线57%（阻力），但无明确拒绝蜡烛；3) 多空爆仓比：BTC和ETH比率>3.38（多头痛苦），但鲸鱼未吸筹；4) 鲸鱼净流向：ETH流出，SOL流入但不极端。综合判断：当前为【KNIFE】风险——市场无趋势（ADX<20），价格可能随机波动，开仓易被止损；且鲸鱼数据未显示强烈吸筹，避免接飞刀。等待ADX>20或RSI<30+鲸鱼流入再行动。
regime_safety.en: 【Required】Based on Section 4E: 1) RSI neutral (43.5-51.71), ADX all <20 (no trend), NATR moderate (1.66%-2.86%); 2) Wick Ratios: BNB lower wick 12% (weak support), ETH upper wick 57% (resistance), but no clear rejection candles; 3) Liquidation L/S Ratios: BTC and ETH >3.38 (long pain), but no whale accumulation; 4) Whale Net Flow: ETH outflow, SOL inflow but not extreme. Verdict: 【KNIFE】 risk—market is trendless (ADX<20), prone to random whipsaws; whale data shows no strong accumulation, avoid catching falling knives. Wait for ADX>20 or RSI<30 with whale inflow before acting.

reflection.zh: 从历史交易中学到：在趋势不明（ADX低）时开仓易被止损；必须严格遵守ADX>20的纪律，避免在无趋势市场中赌博。
